scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) propagates exception when TreeBuilder.parse throws IllegalStateException
scenarios.precondition: parser with stubbed TreeBuilder that throws IllegalStateException in parse(Reader,baseUri,parser)
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalStateException is thrown with stub message
pseudocode: // Arrange a Parser with a TreeBuilder stub that throws IllegalStateException
@Override public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) {
@Override public Document parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); }
@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader in, Element context, String uri, Parser p) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); }
